---
name: Node Request
about: Request a new parametric node for the library
title: "[node] "
labels: node-request, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

## Node name
What would you call this node? (e.g., `SweepAlongCurve`, `MirrorFace`)

## What it does
Describe the operation in one sentence.

## Why it's useful
What kind of models become easier to build with this node?

## Inputs / Outputs
- **Inputs**: (e.g., `solid`, `profile`, `axis`)  
- **Parameters**: (e.g., `angle`, `count`, `distance`)  
- **Output**: (e.g., `solid`)

## OCCT / replicad availability
Is there an OpenCascade class or replicad method that maps to this? (helps estimate effort)

## References
Link to the relevant entry in [node_expansion_research.md](../../docs/research/node_expansion_research.md) if applicable.
